# sdocx fixtures (self-generated, CC0)

- `synthetic-two-page.sdocx` — built by `make_fixture.py` from the
  decoded format knowledge (docs/formats/sdocx.md), byte-reproducible
  (pinned by `test_fixture_generator_is_pinned`). Two pages: fountain
  pen with tilt (uncompressed events) + translucent Marker4
  highlighter; delta-compressed Pencil2 stroke + single-point dot.
  Never opened in Samsung Notes (no oracle on macOS) — hashes and
  offsets are computed per the spec, so a strict parser accepts it.

Real third-party samples stay in `corpus/third-party/twangodev-sdocx/`
(gitignored; GPL repo — samples used as study data only).
